review: Came without a reservation. I live in the area so I know better. It was my niece's 11th birthday and I knew she would appreciate the view. Although they were fully committed, the layout has the bar and the cocktail lounge with seating on either side of the bar in the front end of the dining room. So even if you can't grab a table you won't feel like an outcast. The bar and both sections of the cocktail lounge are adjacent to the dining room. I had the clam chowder and a chop salad. Both were unique and different than what I expected but delightfully so, and extremely delicious. My niece had the nachos which  also wrre different than what she was assuming but very delicious. We both had fillets. Cooked to perfection at medium temperature. I skipped dessert to slurp down a third bloody Mary, while my niece enjoyed the warm vanilla cake and a decaf cappuccino. Everyone was very pleasant and full of smiles. Sarah who  took care of us was knowledgeable of the entire menu and extremely pleasant as well as overwhelmingly beautiful. Her & my niece hit it right off. I greatly appreciated her going the extra mile with my niece.  All said and done I'm glad we wound up in the cocktail lounge, in the very capable hands of Sarah and we really enjoyed this night. Thank you guys.
